text: - E. In addition to any other insurance which Subcontractor may be required or choose to carry, Subcontractor at his sole expense shall maintain  in  effect  the  insurance  coverage  which  is  required  under  the  Subcontract  Documents  with  insurance  companies acceptable to Contractor. Certificate(s) of insurance stating the limits and coverage required by Contractor shall be executed by Subcontractor's insurance carrier(s) as required by Exhibit C to this agreement. Until said certificate(s) of insurance is properly executed by insurance carrier(s) acceptable to Contractor and delivered to Contractor, the Subcontractor may not enter the Project to perform any portion of the sublet work. The cancellation either by the insured or the insurer of any portion of the insurance required to be carried by Subcontractor by this subcontract, or the lapse or suspension of the required insurance for any reason shall  be  considered  a  material  breach  of  this  subcontract  by  Subcontractor,  and  Contractor  shall  be  entitled  to  exercise  the termination rights set forth in paragraph 24 hereof and any other right contained in this subcontract and shall have the right to prohibit Subcontractor from entering the project.
